name: Wild Rice Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a soup pot, pour the broth, sherry, and water. Bring to a boil.
Add the shallots, mushrooms, wild rice, salt, and pepper. Reduce heat to medium.
Cover and cook slowly for 35-40 minutes.
2. Check that the rice is well cooked. If not, cook for another 5 minutes or so.
Check seasoning; add more broth if necessary.
3. Add the cream, chervil, thyme, and pinch of dry mustard. Stir thoroughly.
Cover and simmer for another 10 minutes. Serve immediately or refrigerate for 2 hours
and serve cold.
